English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Male model pornography magazines, mainly single issues 7633
7 cubic feet. 7 cubic feet.
circa 1965-1990 Printed material. Pornography magazines featuring men, mostly the first and only volumes of a title. Collection material in English 3384693
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Andrea Hektor
Date completed:
August 2003
EAD encoding:
Andrea Hektor, April 2004Elyse FinkelSara McDermott, June 2009
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2015
RELATED MATERIALS
Heterosexual and miscellaneous pornography periodicals, #7739
Miscellaneous human sexuality periodicals, #7687
Gay male pornography, erotica, HQ76.G27
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Alphabetical order.
Cite As:
Male model pornography magazines, mainly single issues, #7633. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Pornography magazines featuring men, mostly the first and only volumes of a title. Most show male models with other male models, directed at a gay male audience. Many focus on racial features of the models, including Black men and interracial sex. A few magazines present male models as for a heterosexual female audience.
Sex in mass media. African American men -- Pictorial works -- Periodicals. Gay men -- Pictorial works -- Periodicals. Pornography -- Periodicals.
